recommendations.title: What Time Is It There?
recommendations.overview: A street vendor with a grim home-life forges a connection with a young woman on her way to Paris.

recommendations.title: Rebels of the Neon God
recommendations.overview: In Taipei, four youths face alienation, loneliness, and moments of existential crisis amidst a series of minor crimes.

recommendations.title: Vive L'Amour
recommendations.overview: Three lonely young denizens of Taipei unknowingly share an apartment: May, a real estate agent who uses it for her sexual affairs; Ah-jung, her current lover; and Hsiao-kang, who's stolen the key and uses the apartment as a retreat.

recommendations.title: Goodbye, Dragon Inn
recommendations.overview: On a dark, wet night in Taipei City, a cavernous old picture palace is about to close its doors forever. A meager audience, the remaining few staff, and perhaps even a ghost or two, watch King Hu’s wuxia classic "Dragon Inn", each haunted by memories

recommendations.title: Your Name Engraved Herein
recommendations.overview: In 1987, as martial law ends in Taiwan, Jia-han and Birdy fall in love amid family pressure, homophobia and social stigma.

recommendations.title: The Disaster Artist
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actor in Hollywood meets an enigmatic stranger by the name of Tommy Wiseau, the meeting leads the actor down a path nobody could have predicted; creating the worst movie ever made.

recommendations.title: Yi Yi
recommendations.overview: A Taipei family faces personal and moral uncertainty as everyday events test their relationships and sense of purpose.

recommendations.title: Left-Handed Girl
recommendations.overview: A mother and her two daughters move to Taipei to open a noodle stand at a vibrant night market, but family secrets and tradition test their fresh start.

recommendations.title: Eat Drink Man Woman
recommendations.overview: Retired and widowed Chinese master chef Chu lives in modern day Taipei, with his three attractive daughters, all of whom are unattached. Soon, each daughter encounters a new man in their lives. When these new relationships blossom, stereotypes are br

recommendations.title: Catman
recommendations.overview: Liang Qu is a chic, confident and cold but charming half cat, half human due to a magic spell and he has the ability to melt/heal broken hearts. He lives with Miao Xiaowan, an honest, confident woman who's created an app that translates cats' sounds
